title: Open the app and navigate to the dresses product listing page
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the ShoppingApp | Navigate to the dresses product listing page
expected_result: The dresses product listing page is displayed with a grid of dress options

title: Click on the 'Relevance' filter option
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The dress listings are sorted by relevance

title: Click on the 'Popular' filter option
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The dress listings are sorted by popularity

title: Click on the 'Price' filter option
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The dress listings are sorted by price

title: Click on the 'New' filter option
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The dress listings are sorted by newness

title: Click on a dress image to view the product details
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The product details page for the selected dress is displayed

title: Search for a dress using the search icon
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
test_steps: Click on the search icon | Enter a dress name in the search bar | Press enter
expected_result: The search results for the entered dress name are displayed

title: Click on a dress price to view the product details
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
expected_result: The product details page for the selected dress is displayed

title: Click on a dress engagement metric to view the product details
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
test_steps: Click on a dress engagement metric
expected_result: The product details page for the selected dress is displayed

title: Click on the back arrow to return to the previous screen
preconditions: The dresses product listing page is displayed
